event_description: Triggered when a user updates the appearance of their digital avatar within the platform.

properties.property_description: The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
Boolean indicating if the item is a default starter option.
The name of the collection or series this skin belongs to.
Unique ID for the avatar's skin.
The display name of the skin.
The rarity tier of the skin (e.g., Epic, Common).
The URL of the user's profile or avatar image.
The display name of the user.

event_description: Tracks when a user selects and equips a specific item or accessory to their avatar.

properties.property_description: The name of the collection this wearable belongs to.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
The slot or gear category the wearable occupies (e.g., head, body, weapon).
The attribute or stat that this wearable modifies (e.g., speed, attack, defense).
The percentage value by which the wearable modifies the associated attribute.
The total number of wearables currently equipped on the avatar.
Unique identifier for the wearable item.
The name of the wearable item.
The rarity tier of the wearable item.
The category of the wearable (e.g., shirt, hat).

event_description: Triggered when a user start application for their Freedom Card.

properties.property_description: The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user successfully applies for a physical or virtual Freedom card.

properties.property_description: The membership or benefit level of the card (e.g., Standard, Gold, Platinum).
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The amount of tokens staked by the user to qualify for the card tier.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks payment transactions made using the Freedom Card at various merchants.

properties.property_description: The monetary value involved in the transaction.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
Boolean indicating if a physical card was used.
Merchant Category Code, identifying the type of business.
The business or shop where the transaction occurred.
The category of a related mission or reward program associated with the spend.
The date when the bank finalized the transaction.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user adds monetary balance to their Freedom Card wallet.

properties.property_description: The monetary value involved in the transaction.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The name or label of the top-up product or package selected.
The unique product identifier.
The channel or method used to top up (e.g., bank, promptpay).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a user becomes a member of a new community or group.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The method of joining (e.g., invite, public).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: An administrative event recording when a new promotional banner is created in the management console.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The timestamp when the banner was published or scheduled to go live.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a reward, mission, or marketing campaign is launched by an admin.

properties.property_description: A human-readable description detailing the purpose or rules of the campaign.
The name of the reward or marketing campaign.
The category of the campaign (Mission, Reward, etc.).
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The date and time when the campaign expires or closes.
An array of reward objects distributed to participants upon campaign completion.
An individual reward entry within the rewards array.
The display name of the individual reward.
The unique identifier of the token granted as a reward.
The type or category of the reward (e.g., token, NFT, badge).
The date and time when the campaign becomes active.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks the creation of a new community entity via the console.

properties.property_description: The topic or interest category the community belongs to (e.g., Sports, Finance, Gaming).
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The access model of the community (e.g., public, private, invite-only).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a new custom community token is generated for the ecosystem.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique identifier of the newly created digital token.
The name of the digital token.
The total number of tokens minted or available in the token supply.
The short ticker symbol representing the token (e.g., FDM, XYZ).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a payment via the FDP service is successfully finalized.

properties.property_description: The currency code used (e.g., THB, USD).
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
Any processing fees charged during the transaction.
The country inferred from the user's IP address at the time of payment.
The name of the merchant receiving the payment.
The total amount of the order before fees.
The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.
The unique identifier of the organization or merchant entity.
The display name of the organization or merchant entity.
The actual amount charged to the user, including any applicable fees.
The type of payment used.
The origin of the funds used for payment (e.g., wallet balance, credit card, bank transfer).
An optional free-text note or memo attached to the payment transaction.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user verifies their email address for their Freedom Wallet account.

properties.property_description: The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks when a user successfully logs into the Freedom Wallet or related apps.

properties.property_description: The unique key for the application being used.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The user's registered email address.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a user participates in a governance or community poll.

properties.property_description: An array of answer choices the user selected in the vote.
An individual choice entry within the choices array.
The label or category of the voting option (e.g., the question dimension or attribute being voted on).
The specific value or answer the user selected for this trait.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The unique identifier for this voting submission record.
The unique identifier of the governance proposal being voted on.
The English-language title of the governance proposal.
The Thai-language title of the governance proposal.
Unique internal identifier for the user.
The weighted influence of the user's vote, based on their token holdings or staking.

event_description: Records when a user sends a referral or invitation to a friend.

properties.property_description: The unique identifier of the referral campaign.
The name of the reward or marketing campaign.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
Boolean indicating whether the referral reward can be converted to another token type.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The platform or channel through which the invitation was sent (e.g., LINE, email, link).
The unique identifier of the user who was invited.
The quantity of tokens involved.
The name of the digital token.
Unique internal identifier for the user.
The KYC or identity verification level required to qualify for the referral reward.

event_description: Triggered when an invitation is successfully accepted and verified.

properties.property_description: The unique identifier of the referral campaign.
The name of the reward or marketing campaign.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
Boolean indicating whether the referral reward can be converted to another token type.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The platform or channel through which the invitation was sent (e.g., LINE, email, link).
The unique identifier of the user who was invited and verified.
The quantity of tokens involved.
The name of the digital token.
Unique internal identifier for the user.
The KYC or identity verification level attained by the referee to confirm the invitation.

event_description: Tracks the purchase of goods, services, or digital items within the shop.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
The currency code used (e.g., THB, USD).
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The transaction or service fee charged on this purchase.
An array of merchandise items included in the order.
An individual merchandise item within the order.
The community identifier associated with this merchandise item.
The category or type of the merchandise item (e.g., digital, physical, voucher).
The unique identifier of the individual merchandise item.
The display name of the merchandise item.
The unique identifier for this line item within the order.
The unique identifier of the shop where this item originates.
The display name of the shop where this item originates.
The number of units of this item included in the order.
The fulfillment type of the item (e.g., digital download, physical delivery).
The price per single unit of this merchandise item.
The total value of this line item (unit_price × quantity).
The top-level category of the purchased merchandise (e.g., digital, physical, voucher).
The unique identifier of the primary merchandise item purchased.
The display name of the primary merchandise item purchased.
The fulfillment type of the primary merchandise item (e.g., digital, physical).
The unique identifier for the purchase order.
The unique identifier of the shop where the primary item originates.
The display name of the shop where the primary item originates.
The type of payment used.
The total number of units of the primary item purchased.
The total amount paid by the user for the entire order, including fees.
The combined quantity of all items across the entire order.
The price per single unit of the primary merchandise item.
Unique internal identifier for the user.
The total value of the primary merchandise item (unit_price × quantity).

event_description: Triggered when a digital NFT event ticket is scanned and confirmed at a venue.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The blockchain smart contract address for the NFT ticket collection.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The unique product identifier.
The display name of the event or product associated with the ticket.
The number of tickets validated in this event.
Unique identifier for the NFT ticket.
The on-chain token ID of the NFT ticket on the blockchain.
Unique internal identifier for the user.
The code or QR payload used to validate the ticket at the venue.
The unique identifier for this ticket validation event.
The identifier of the staff member or system that performed the validation.

event_description: Recorded when a physical Freedom Card is linked and ready for use.

properties.property_description: The membership or benefit level of the activated physical card (e.g., Standard, Gold, Platinum).
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks when a user successfully claims a reward from a referral program.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The unique identifier of the mission associated with this referral claim.
The display name of the mission associated with this referral claim.
The unique identifier of the user who was referred and triggered the claim.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a user posts a comment on a social feed or post.

properties.property_description: Unique ID of the specific comment.
The text content of the comment posted by the user.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply in a thread.
The ID of the content being referenced or replied to.
The type of content being referenced (e.g., post, comment).
The ID of the object being interacted with.
The type of the target object (user, community, post).
The user ID or handle of the person being mentioned or replied to.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user follows another user's profile.

properties.property_description: The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The ID of the user who was followed.
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Triggered when a user publishes new content to a community social feed.

properties.property_description: The topic or interest category of the community where the post is published.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
An array of media files (images, videos) attached to the post.
An individual media file object within the files array.
The cloud storage bucket where this file is stored.
The unique identifier for this attached media file.
The S3 object key path used to retrieve the file from cloud storage.
The media type of the file (e.g., image, video).
The publicly accessible URL of the attached media file.
The timestamp when the post was originally created.
Unique identifier for the social post.
The ID of the object being interacted with.
The type of the target object (user, community, post).
The textual content of a post or comment.
The physical street address of the tagged location.
The latitude and longitude coordinates of the tagged location.
The name of the location tagged.
The visibility setting of the location tag (e.g., public, friends only, hidden).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks when a user or moderator removes a post.

properties.property_description: The topic or interest category of the community where the post was published.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
An array of media files that were attached to the deleted post.
An individual media file object within the files array.
The unique identifier for this attached media file.
The media type of the file (e.g., image, video).
The publicly accessible URL of the attached media file.
Unique identifier for the social post.
The ID of the object being interacted with.
The type of the target object (user, community, post).
The textual content of a post or comment.
The physical street address of the tagged location.
The latitude and longitude coordinates of the tagged location.
The name of the location tagged.
The visibility setting of the location tag (e.g., public, friends only, hidden).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user reacts (like, heart, etc.) to a post or comment.

properties.property_description: The topic or interest category of the community where the reacted content lives.
Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The ID of the post or comment being reacted to.
The text content of the post or comment being reacted to.
The type of reaction expressed by the user (e.g., like, love, haha, sad).
The ID of the object being interacted with.
The type of the target object (user, community, post).
Unique internal identifier for the user.

event_description: Tracks the acquisition of digital tokens or virtual currencies.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.
The platform or service channel used to process the token purchase (e.g., in-app, web, third-party).
The type of payment used.
The name or label of the token package or product purchased.
The quantity of tokens involved.
The name of the digital token.
The fiat or source currency amount used to fund the token purchase.
The channel or method used to top up (e.g., bank, promptpay).

event_description: Triggered when an admin modifies a Point of Interest or community location.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The unique ID for the Point of Interest.
The name of the point of interest.
The current approval or activity status of the location.
The geographic latitude of the location.
The geographic longitude of the location.
Boolean indicating if the event was triggered from the management console.
Identifier for the user participating in a community mission.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.

event_description: Records updates to the publishing status of a community or project.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
Indicates if the community is published or unpublished.
Boolean indicating if the event was triggered from the management console.
Identifier for the user participating in a community mission.
The unique QuestLabs identifier associated with the entity or project.

event_description: Triggered when the profile settings of a community are updated in the console.

properties.property_description: Unique identifier of the community.
Display name of the community.
The hexadecimal color code used for branding.
The list of topic or interest categories assigned to the community.
The text description for a community or profile.
Boolean indicating if the default cover image is in use.

Boolean indicating if the event was triggered from the management console.
